posts.name: Kilo Code v7 for VS Code
posts.tagline: Parallel agents, diff reviewer, and multi-model comparisons
posts.description: We've completely rebuilt Kilo Code for VS Code, built on OpenCode server. New portable core, parallel tool calls, subagent delegation, inline code review, multi-model comparisons. Get started: kilo.ai/install

posts.name: Velo 2.0
posts.tagline: Instantly turn your voice and screen into shareable videos
posts.description: Velo 2.0 is a whole new way to make video messages. It turns raw screen recordings into polished videos and docs, with a chat-native editor, real-time processing, voice cloning, and smart script rewriting. Edit by chatting, not timelines. Record once and get both a video and a doc. Write a script even when there is no audio. Change tone anytime. Everything updates live, so the whole experience feels faster, easier, and more natural.

posts.name: Flowstep 1.0
posts.tagline: AI design engineer. Design & ship real UI.
posts.description: Flowstep is the AI design engineer for developers and technical designers tired of rebuilding designs in code. Prompt or edit on an infinite canvas. Export production code or connect with your agents and apps via MCP. What you design is exactly what ships.

posts.name: Waydev Agent
posts.tagline: Prove ROI and see if your AI spend is actually paying off
posts.description: Waydev measures the AI Adoption, AI Impact, and AI ROI of your engineering teams, copilots, and autonomous agents — across every tool from Cursor to Claude Code to Devin. Ask Waydev, our agent, turns engineering data into answers in plain English (and more). Skills let you configure it with SKILL.md files. MCP exposes your engineering feed to any external agent. Built for engineering leaders who'd rather have conversations than dashboards.

posts.name: Ghostwriter
posts.tagline: Write and publish posts on LinkedIn & X
posts.description: Your personal AI ghostwriter that writes, schedules, and publishes posts on LinkedIn and X – so you never run out of content to share.

posts.name: Oriane
posts.tagline: The perception layer for Marketers and their AIs
posts.description: 91% of internet bandwidth is led by videos that your AI does NOT watch... Oriane watches millions of social videos a day, and turns what's on screen, in audio and in captions into a structured intelligence layer for teams and their AI apps to find niche creators, spot content trends, identify viral hooks and more!

posts.name: Intuned Agent
posts.tagline: Production browser automation, built and maintained by AI
posts.description: Intuned Agent is an AI agent that builds and maintains production browser automations. Describe the scraper, crawler, or RPA workflow you need, and it writes Playwright code, validates it on the live site, and deploys it to Intuned to run at scale. It also helps debug, update, and maintain automations as websites change.

posts.name: PaceBar
posts.tagline: A quiet pace instrument for your Mac
posts.description: PaceBar is a private Mac menu-bar app that turns on-device interaction patterns into a simple load readout, helping you notice rising work pace, reduce app switching, and take short resets when a session gets heavy.

posts.name: Firstwork
posts.tagline: Agentic AI for frontline hiring and onboarding
posts.description: The operational AI layer for frontline hiring. Firstwork replaces fragmented onboarding workflows with one pipeline for verification, credential checks, training, scheduling, compliance, and workforce readiness. Frontline teams move workers from application to day-1 faster while reducing manual follow-up, onboarding delays, and audit risk across healthcare, logistics, staffing, retail, and field operations.

posts.name: Hestus
posts.tagline: Native CAD autocomplete — 2.5x faster, 4x fewer clicks
posts.description: Hestus brings autocomplete to CAD, helping teams move 2.5x faster with 4x fewer clicks. No clunky prompts or workflow pivots. Hestus lives natively in your CAD environment, predicting your next move by understanding design intent in real-time. Just design as you always do, only much faster.

posts.name: Dina
posts.tagline: From screen to polished video in minutes
posts.description: Dina is a macOS app that handles your entire video workflow in one place. Record your screen, edit clips, auto-clean audio, add voiceovers, transcript-driven editing, AI caption generation, text-to-speech voiceovers, keyboard shortcuts, beautiful annotations capabilities, ios recordings, upto 8k exports and many more — all without jumping between five different tools. Built for and creators who want professional results without the production nightmare.

posts.name: Zyphe
posts.tagline: Agentic Privacy-first KYC and KYB with MCP
posts.description: The KYC compliance platform for identity and KYB. Zyphe lets your team and your AI agents run identity checks without storing personal data, so users verify once and never repeat the process.

posts.name: Unity AI
posts.tagline: AI agents built directly into Unity workflows
posts.description: Unity AI is a beta suite for Unity 6+ that brings agentic assistance directly into the Editor. It includes a project-aware assistant, AI Gateway for connecting third-party agents, and Unity’s official MCP Server for bridging Unity with IDEs and external tools.

posts.name: AWEAR
posts.tagline: Discreet brainwave wearable for real-time mental insights
posts.description: AWEAR is a discreet ear-worn EEG wearable that measures mental states in real time. While existing wearables track fitness, sleep, and nutrition, AWEAR directly captures brain activity to provide insights into stress, focus, and emotions. It is specifically designed to track brainwaves continuously unlike other neurotech devices. Our patent-pending AI translates brainwaves into actionable feedback through a mobile app, helping users understand and improve their mental wellbeing.

posts.name: Nucleo
posts.tagline: Automated cancer diagnostics
posts.description: World models are the hottest race in AI right now. Every frontier lab is building one - but they're all aimed at robotics, generalist agents, autonomous vehicles. None at oncology. We're the first.

posts.name: Steam Controller
posts.tagline: Game with TMR sticks, dual haptic trackpads, + gyro controls
posts.description: Steam Controller is Valve’s new configurable controller for the full Steam library. It combines magnetic TMR thumbsticks, dual haptic trackpads, gyro, Grip Sense, four grip buttons, Steam Input customization, and a low-latency wireless charging puck.

posts.name: Breathwrk
posts.tagline: Learn and master breathwork with guided breathing exercises
posts.description: Breathwrk, now a part of Peloton, is #1 breathing app for Sleep, Stress, Focus, and Energy. Breathwrk is a simple yet powerful way to improve your mental and physical well-being in just seconds with neuroscience-based breathing exercises. Get a full sensory experience with customizable sounds, visuals, haptic vibrations, and breath coaches. Build your practice by setting reminders, tracking streaks, and following Breathwrk’s recommended protocols.

posts.name: Airbyte Agents
posts.tagline: The context layer for production-grade AI agent
posts.description: The context layer for production-grade AI agents. Connect Salesforce, Stripe, Zendesk +50 more into a queryable Context Store, so your agent reasons across systems without stitching APIs at runtime. UI, MCP, or SDK. 40% fewer tool calls, up to 80% fewer tokens.

posts.name: Blaze
posts.tagline: The AI-powered calendar that plans your day for you.
posts.description: Blaze is your complete productivity system. Tasks, events, projects, and notes: all in one smart calendar. Connect Google Calendar and Apple Calendar, collaborate with your team, and let the AI reorganize your day, find free slots, and balance your workload automatically. Free to start. Available on Mac, iPhone, and iPad.

posts.name: Openclick
posts.tagline: macOS agent that turns prompts into automated clicks
posts.description: openclick is an experimental open-source CLI that drives macOS UI from a prompt. An LLM produces a plan of UI actions; openclick executes them via the macOS Accessibility APIs. Early and rough. MIT-licensed.

posts.name: Openclick
posts.tagline: macOS agent that turns prompts into automated clicks
posts.description: openclick is an experimental open-source CLI that drives macOS UI from a prompt. An LLM produces a plan of UI actions; openclick executes them via the macOS Accessibility APIs. Early and rough. MIT-licensed.

posts.name: Hutsy

It automatically personalizes training plans and nutrition. Making personalized fitness affordable and unlocking a scalable business model for creators.

Your audio never leaves your device. 🎤 Record ⬆️ Upload ✂️ Cut & Adjust 🔊 Volume 🎵 Background music ⏪ Undo/redo 🔍 Zoom 💾 Export

posts.name: Journey AI by Journey Foods
posts.tagline: Supply chain agents and data for consumer product teams
posts.description: Journey AI gives consumer brands AI tools for ingredient intelligence, cost prediction, and supply chain planning. It is positioned for product development and operations teams managing food and CPG workflows at scale.

posts.name: Autotune
posts.tagline: Run local LLMs faster and smoother on your device
posts.description: Autotune is an open-source runtime optimizer for local LLMs that reduces KV cache memory, improves first-token latency, and dynamically adapts inference settings to your hardware and workload. It works with Ollama, MLX, and as an API. Results from benchmarks show that Autotune can lower time-to-first-token by 39%, wall time for agentic workflows by 46%, and KV cache memory usage by 67%. Features include an OpenAI-compatible local API, a built-in CLI, RAM management, and model recommendations.

posts.name: SONODAY Radio

posts.description: SONODAY Radio brings back the magic of FM radio, but for podcasts. Instead of scrolling through endless feeds, choose a category (True Crime, Tech, Comedy, etc) and let it play. Curated shows stream continuously, 24/7, with real-time schedules so everyone hears the same episode at the same time. No algorithm. Just great podcasts playing like a radio station you never have to program. Rediscover a favorite or find something new! Free to listen. Premium unlocks skip, seek and custom stations.

posts.name: OpenPartner

posts.name: PlankPact
posts.tagline: The plank app where quitting hurts someone else too.
posts.description: Before building PlankPact, we ran a simple experiment. We paired 14 strangers on WhatsApp and gave them one task: do a plank every day for 7 days. If your partner quits — you both lose. All 7 pairs completed the challenge. 3 continued on their own. That experiment became this app. Research shows we're more afraid of letting someone down than failing ourselves. That's the entire mechanic behind PlankPact.

posts.name: relly
posts.tagline: The AI teammate that ends follow-up meetings.

posts.description: AMAUTA Libre is a free-forever personal growth app — no ads, no paywall, no credit card. Track daily habits, manage personal finances, set goals at 30/90/180 days, organize tasks and ideas, and access 16 personal growth materials. All in one place. Built as a PWA: installs from the browser in seconds, works on any device. Available in 10 languages: Spanish, English, Portuguese, French, Chinese, Hindi, Arabic, Russian, Indonesian, and Japanese. Made in Argentina. Built for the world.

posts.name: TOEFL Mini Practice App
posts.tagline: Practice all 4 TOEFL 2026 format skills in 10 minutes a day
posts.description: Most TOEFL apps still use the old format. This one was rebuilt completely for January 2026 - new band scoring (1-6), adaptive testing, and updated tasks across all 4 skills. 10-minute sessions. Instant AI feedback. Every time you practice you get one clear thing to fix - not just a score. Built for students who can't clear 2 hours daily but still need to hit Band 5.5+ for MIT, Stanford, or top US universities.

posts.name: Engine by redsystem
posts.tagline: Generate, host and payments from a live website in one click
posts.description: Hey Product Hunt! I am a completely self-taught developer. I learned c++ for a year in 2012. Now I built Engine. It’s an AI website builder. Instant Monetization: Just paste a Stripe, PayPal, or Gumroad link into the assets drawer, and the AI will perfectly integrate a working checkout button into your design. Custom Domains: You can attach your owncom domain right from the dashboard, and it provisions the SSL and DNS automatically. I would absolutely love for you to test it out. Cheers, Chris

posts.name: Domek
posts.tagline: One place for your household’s calendar, chores, and more
posts.description: Domek is a collaborative house planner designed to cater to households. Plan your schedules, tasks, grocery shopping, expenses, and take down notes without using numerous applications. Unlike many other applications, Domek allows you to use a single subscription for your whole house rather than paying per user.

posts.name: Artospect
posts.tagline: See any artwork on your wall in AR — no app needed
posts.description: Most people buy art they've never seen on their wall. Artospect AR fixes that. Upload any artwork → get an AR QR code your buyers can scan to see it life-size in their actual room. No app download. Free to try. Works on any phone.

posts.name: Qoviro
posts.tagline: Stop chasing approvals. Your clients have a portal now.
posts.description: Freelancers waste hours chasing client feedback over email, WhatsApp, and endless attachment threads. Qoviro fixes that. Give your clients a clean portal to review files, approve deliverables, and message you in real time without the back-and-forth chaos. You upload, they review, everyone moves forward. Built for solo freelancers who do serious work and deserve a serious client experience. File approvals, real-time messaging, project tracking, and billing — all in one place.

posts.name: Freshli
posts.tagline: Rescue expiring food with on-device Apple Intelligence
posts.description: Freshli is a private, on-device food-rescue app for iPhone. Scan a barcode or receipt, get smart expiry alerts, and let Apple Intelligence write recipes from what's about to go off — 100% on-device, no servers, no data leaving your phone. Voice-activated via Siri, hands-free cooking mode, Apple Watch complications, Live Activities, community sharing, and a cinematic Weekly Wrap of items saved + CO₂ avoided. Free, in 10 languages. Rescue food. Save the planet.

posts.name: AudioConcierge.ai
posts.tagline: 24/7 WhatsApp AI receptionist for small businesses
posts.description: AudioConcierge handles WhatsApp voice notes and text messages 24/7 -booking appointments into Google Calendar automatically. Built for dental clinics, restaurants and salons in Ireland.

posts.tagline: The only HSA/FSA you can spend on wellness products

posts.name: Inquirly

posts.name: Justy

We give teams a dedicated control plane for approval, replay, proof, trusted identity, and decision records across any model, runtime, or hosting stack. Instead of adding another workflow layer or another dashboard, OSuite turns agent execution into work organizations can actually review, trust, and ship.

Free to try.

It ensures Manifest V3 compliance and proper wiring, reducing debugging time. Ideal for quickly building and testing simple to moderately complex extensions.

posts.name: tuitab
posts.tagline: Explore CSV, Parquet, JSON, SQLite, DuckDB in your terminal
posts.description: Fast, keyboard-driven TUI for exploring tabular data in your terminal. Open CSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel, SQLite or DuckDB with one command. Zero Python, zero GUI, zero dependencies. cargo install tuitab brew install tuitab Apache-2.0 · Built in Rust 🦀
